currentState: Old, efficient trust. They challenge each other freely, divide labor fast, and do not need to explain the shape of the other's competence.
powerDynamic: Sylvanas carries field authority and decisive command; Lor'themar carries the political burden she refuses and translates border reality into institutional language.

physicalDynamics.pattern: They ride side by side at a pace neither has to set aloud; the shared rhythm itself signals history.

nameUsage.sylvanasCallsLorthemar: Lor'themar, always by first name and with blunt familiarity.
nameUsage.lorthemarCallsSylvanas: Sylvanas in private shorthand rather than rank formality.

history.event: Their chapter-1 banter makes clear they have long practice at balancing Sylvanas's field instincts against Lor'themar's political patience.

trajectory: Baseline ease -> strategic separation as the wider crisis starts forcing them onto different roads.
